title: Mendeleev
description: Huge amounts of materials from real world chemistry elements.
body:
# Mendeleev —— An elements mod

## Prospect version : β 0.5 | Lithium Update
### Infomation 
Now Snapshot: β0.5α1 (Some features are not developed)    
Version : Fabric 0.14.21 , Minecraft 1.19.4;    
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lithium    
### ADD blocks
>**Spodumenite**  | **Ore** spawn in overworld y: -24~64;    (o)

>**Smelting Furnace** | Can **smelt some ore**;(x)

### ADD Items
>**Lithium (Li2CO3) Ingot**  | Material; *(I ignored Its nature so it's not so active in minecraft now.)*(o)
>> **Lithium Fuel Rod**  | fuel | made of **Lithium Ingot** and **Iron Ingot**;*(Can burn longer than coal fuels)*(x)

*! The version content will change anytime before release*
